name: Rewiser
description: Rewiser is a smart finance tool to manage budgets, track transactions, and automate your financial workflow. The API features multi-layer protection including rate limiting (20 requests per 5 minutes), duplicate detection within 24-hour windows, request fingerprinting, and AI-powered data normalization for handling inconsistent input formats.
